steps.title: Set up the equation using the desired profit
steps.content:
The profit function is $p(x) = 6x - 210$. To find how many stickers need to be sold for a profit of $750$, set $p(x) = 750$:
$$750 = 6x - 210$$

steps.title: Solve the linear equation for x
steps.content:
Add 210 to both sides of the equation:
$$6x = 960$$
Divide both sides by 6:
$$x = \frac{960}{6} = 160$$
The drama club must sell 160 bumper stickers.
